title: Example 6-6 stress concentration and notch sensitivity for a shouldered steel shaft in bending

notes: This file follows Example 6-6 on p303-p305.
K_t is fetched from table_a_15_9.json using D/d and r/d interpolation.
Part (a) uses figure_6_20.json for q in bending.
Small differences from the textbook are expected because the chart files are digitized approximations.
